title: Silky Umami Japanese Stir-fry
description: A delicious monsoon-inspired stir-fry dish featuring umami flavors and a touch of rum for added depth without compromising on sugar-free-friendly status.

ingredients.name: cornstarch slurry
ingredients.amount: 1 tbsp water, 1 tsp cornstarch mixed together

instructions: Preheat your wok or a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sautee shiitake mushrooms in sesame oil for about 5 minutes until they release their liquid and slightly brown.
Add baby bok choy, ginger, carrots, soy sauce, rice vinegar, salt, and cornstarch slurry. Stir-fry everything together until the vegetables are just tender-crisp, around 7-10 minutes.
Stir in peanut butter (make sure to use a bit of extra for an umami boost), simmer for another minute or so till heated through.
Sprinkle with sesame seeds before serving.
